holdings.infoBox: HCMT is an equity ETF with a total of 511 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 15.93%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 12.51%, Invesco Qqq Trust Series 1 Swap at 6.52%, NVIDIA at 4.96%, and Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 4.83%.

overview.description: The Direxion HCM Tactical Enhanced US ETF (HCMT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that toggles between a 200% leveraged US equity position and a 100% investment to cash or cash equivalents based on a proprietary tactical indicator that identifies broad trends in the US equity markets. HCMT was launched on Jun 22, 2023 and is issued by Direxion.
